_comment: Bootstrap baseline for the daily SEO health tripwire (/api/cron/seo-health). The first cron run reads this, then writes its new baseline to the Supabase table seo_health_baseline (id=1) because Vercel serverless disks are not writable at runtime. Committed (not gitignored) on purpose so we have a reproducible first-run state and a fallback if Supabase is unreachable. Safe to keep small — issues are stored in Supabase after run 1.
